expectations.text: behavioral_check: Routes the custom pipeline to LFPBandV1 (or LFPBandSelection) as the upstream FK — does NOT take LFPOutput (wideband/raw LFP) as the primary upstream and re-filter inside the custom make()
behavioral_check: Places SpyglassMixin as the FIRST base class in the Computed table (MRO order: `class X(SpyglassMixin, dj.Computed):`)

behavioral_check: Foreign-keys on LFPBandV1 master, projecting `filter_name` (or equivalent) to disambiguate when both theta and gamma rows are referenced. NEVER foreign-keys a part-table column directly.
expectations.evidence: Doesn't FK LFPBandV1; uses LFPV1. The filter_name disambiguation question never comes up because the response computes both bands inside make().

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Separates Params / Selection / Computed into three tiers

behavioral_check: Does NOT prefix the schema name with `spyglass_` — personal/team schemas use `<database_user>_<suffix>`, so `testuser_theta_gamma` as the user proposed is correct, not `spyglass_testuser_theta_gamma`
